title: Guard Exit
description: Use guard statements to perform early exits when required conditions are not met, simplifying nesting.
problemStatement:
Early exit! Write a function `process(input: String?)` that uses `guard let` to unwrap the input. If it is `nil`, the function should `return` immediately. Otherwise, print the unwrapped input.

**Requirement:** The `guard` block MUST exit the scope (use `return`).
hints: `guard` keeps your happy path at the first level of indentation, making code much easier to read.
